papers.title_en: MedBench: Deliberative Evaluation of Medical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出MedBench，一个旨在将医疗语言模型作为“深思熟虑代理”而非单纯预测器进行评估的新型基准。该基准涵盖来自6个医疗问答数据集的19,625个问题，对8个参数规模在4B至32B之间的模型进行了全面测试。MedBench通过模拟复杂的临床决策过程，为评估医疗大模型在实际应用中的推理和决策能力提供了更深入的视角，填补了现有评估体系的空白。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce MedBench, a benchmark for evaluating medical language models asdeliberating agents rather than isolated predictors. MedBench evaluates eightmodels (4B? 32B) on 19,625 questions from six medical QA datasets using …

papers.title_en: Dual-Latent Memory Routing for Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型在长文本生成过程中容易丢失早期视觉证据的问题，提出了双潜变量记忆路由（Dual-Latent Memory Routing）机制。该方法通过优化视觉信息的存储与检索路径，增强了模型在复杂视觉语言推理任务中的长期记忆能力，有效缓解了长序列生成时的性能衰减，显著提升了推理的准确性与逻辑一致性。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently made strong progress invision-language reasoning, yet their performance often degrades as generationsgrow longer. A key factor is that they frequently lose track of earlier visual evidence …

papers.title_en: Minibatch selection for Language Models via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在异构数据训练中难以兼顾收敛速度与领域覆盖的问题，提出了一种基于分区拟阵约束的梯度匹配小批量选择方法。该方法通过在满足特定领域分布约束的前提下，动态选择与全局梯度最匹配的样本子集，从而加速模型收敛并确保数据多样性。实验证明，该方法在提升训练效率和模型性能方面优于传统采样策略，为大规模异构数据的优化训练提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selectingminibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains.Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on …

papers.title_en: CofactGVR: Counterfactual Intervention for Grounded Visual Reasoning
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大模型在定位视觉推理（GVR）中因缺乏中间定位信号而易陷入捷径学习的问题，本文提出了 CofactGVR 框架。该方法引入反事实干预机制，通过构建对比场景来强化模型对关键视觉区域的感知，从而提供更精准的定位监督。研究证明，该方法能有效减少模型对虚假相关性的依赖，显著提升了复杂视觉推理任务的性能与可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Despite rapid progress in Grounded Visual Reasoning (GVR) with MLLMs and RL-style fine-tuning, existing approaches often lack effective learning signals forintermediate grounding decisions and are prone to shortcut solutions. In this work …

papers.title_en: MVE-QGCAF: Multi-Grained visual evidence construction and question-guided gated cross-attention fusion for medical visual question answering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗视觉问答（MedVQA）中准确回答临床问题的挑战，提出了MVE-QGCAF模型。该模型通过构建多粒度视觉证据（MVE）来捕捉医疗图像的细节与全局特征，并利用问题引导的门控交叉注意力融合（QGCAF）机制，实现视觉与文本信息的深度交互。这一方法有效提升了生成式视觉语言模型在处理复杂医疗影像时的表现，为临床决策提供了更精准的辅助。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Medical Visual Question Answering (MedVQA) aims to generate accurateanswers to clinical questions based on medical images. Although recent generativevision-language models have improved open-ended answer generation, two key …

papers.title_en: PIPA: Prior-Driven Prompting with Diagnosis-Oriented Retrieval-Augmentation for 3D Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对3D放射科报告自动生成的挑战，提出了PIPA框架。该框架创新性地结合了先验驱动的提示词（Prior-Driven Prompting）和面向诊断的检索增强（Diagnosis-Oriented Retrieval-Augmentation）技术。通过利用多模态基础模型并引入临床先验知识，PIPA能够更准确地捕捉3D影像中的病理特征，生成高质量且符合临床逻辑的诊断报告，有效提升了自动化报告生成的准确性并减轻了医师负担。
papers.abstract_en: Automatic radiology report generation has gained increasing attention for itspotential to assist in clinical reporting and reduce the workload of radiologists.Existing 3D radiology report generation methods employ multi-modal foundation …

papers.title_en: Preoperative Prediction of Glypican-3 Expression in Hepatocellular Carcinoma Using Sonazoid Contrast-Enhanced Ultrasound Radiomics
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发并验证一种基于Sonazoid造影剂增强超声（CEUS）的无创影像组学方法，用于术前预测孤立性肝细胞癌（HCC）患者的磷脂酰肌醇蛋白聚糖-3（GPC3）表达状态。通过提取和分析超声影像中的组学特征，该研究为HCC的精准诊断和预后评估提供了一种有效的辅助手段，有助于优化患者的个体化治疗策略。
papers.abstract_en: Objective To develop and validate a noninvasive radiomics approach based onSonazoid contrast-enhanced ultrasound (CEUS) for preoperative prediction ofGlypican-3 (GPC3) status in solitary hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) patients and to …

papers.title_en: Per-Rater Posterior Encoders for Diversified Multi-Rater Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中多标注者意见不一的问题，本文提出了一种基于独立后验编码器的概率模型。该方法不再将所有标注者的差异压缩为单一分布，而是通过为每个标注者学习特定的后验分布，实现了能够体现不同标注风格的多样化分割预测，有效保留了医学诊断中的不确定性和个体差异。
papers.abstract_en: Multi-rater medical image segmentation should produce one plausible output perannotator style, not collapse all the dis-agreement into one prediction. Mostprobabilistic models handle this by learning a shared posterior over all annota-tors' …

papers.title_en: A Multi-Center Benchmark for Abdominal Disease Diagnosis and Report Generation from Non-Contrast CT
papers.tldr: 本研究针对增强CT（CECT）带来的造影剂肾病风险、高昂采集成本及放射科医生沉重负担等问题，提出了一个基于非增强CT（NCCT）的多中心腹部疾病诊断与报告生成基准。通过构建大规模多中心数据集，该研究探索了在无需造影剂的情况下实现准确病变识别与自动化报告生成的可能性，为降低临床风险和提升诊断效率提供了重要的数据支持与技术参考。
papers.abstract_en: Multiphasic contrast-enhanced CT (CECT) is widely used for abdominal lesioncharacterization, yet it carries inherent risks of contrast-induced nephropathy,escalates acquisition burden, and heavily contributes to radiologist workload. To …

papers.title_en: Revisiting LLM Adaptation for 3D CT Report Generation: A Study of Scaling and Diagnostic Priors
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了如何将大语言模型（LLM）有效适配于3D CT报告生成任务。针对医疗影像与自然图像的差异，研究重点分析了模型缩放（Scaling）和引入诊断先验（Diagnostic Priors）对性能的影响。通过优化视觉编码器与LLM的结合，提出了一种增强医疗报告准确性和专业性的适配方案，为3D医疗影像的自动化分析提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advances in multimodal learning, including large language models (LLMs)and vision-language models (VLMs), have demonstrated strong adaptability tonatural images. However, extending their use to the medical domain, particularly for …

papers.tldr: 本研究针对生成式语言模型中嵌入矩阵随词表规模线性增长导致的参数冗余问题，提出了 MultiHashFormer。该模型借鉴了编码器模型中的哈希技术，通过将多个 token 映射至共享向量来压缩参数空间。实验表明，该方法在显著降低模型参数量的同时，仍能保持良好的生成性能，为大规模词表下的轻量化模型设计提供了有效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Language models (LMs) represent tokens using embedding matrices that scalelinearly with the vocabulary size. To constrain the parameter footprint, prior workproposes hashing many tokens into a single vector within encoder-only models …

papers.title_en: Mural: Transferring LLM knowledge to image generation via Mixture-of-Transformers
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了如何将冻结的大语言模型（LLM）知识有效迁移至文本生成图像（T2I）任务中。作者提出了名为 Mural 的架构，通过 Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) 机制，在不微调 LLM 的情况下，利用其强大的语义理解能力来增强图像生成的质量和一致性。该方法显著提升了模型对复杂提示词的理解，是利用预训练语言模型提升多模态生成能力的重要尝试。
papers.abstract_en: Leveraging capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in text-to-image (T2I)synthesis is an important research direction. In this work we investigate whether theknowledge of a frozen LLM can be effectively utilized in T2I generation when trained …

papers.title_en: Discrete Diffusion Language Models for Interactive Radiology Report Drafting
papers.tldr: 本研究探索了离散扩散语言模型在放射报告交互式起草中的应用。针对传统自回归模型在非线性编辑和交互性方面的不足，研究利用扩散模型双向去噪的特性，实现了更灵活的文本生成方式。该方法在医疗基础模型领域具有重要意义，不仅在生成质量上可与自回归模型媲美，还显著增强了放射科医生在撰写报告时的交互体验和编辑效率。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion language models, which generate text by denoising a token canvasbidirectionally instead of emitting tokens left to right, have become competitive withautoregressive (AR) generation. Medical foundation models, however, remain almost …

papers.title_en: Scene Graph Thinking: Reinforcing Structured Visual Reasoning for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型在处理视觉任务时往往关注孤立物体而忽视结构化关系的问题，提出了“场景图思维”（Scene Graph Thinking）。该方法通过将场景图引入推理过程，强化了模型对物体间空间与逻辑关联的感知，显著提升了其在目标导航等复杂任务中的结构化推理能力，为增强MLLM的视觉理解提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong perceptionand reasoning capabilities. However, most existing models focus on isolated objectsand neglect structured relationships for efficient target navigation, limiting their …

papers.title_en: Seeing What Matters: Lesion-Aware High-Resolution Patch Discovery and Fusion for Chest X-ray Report Generation
papers.tldr: 针对胸部X射线报告生成中因输入分辨率低导致病灶细节丢失的问题，本文提出了一种病灶感知的多分辨率补丁发现与融合框架。该方法通过识别并提取高分辨率图像中的关键病灶区域，将其与全局特征融合，克服了预训练视觉编码器固定Token预算的限制，显著提升了报告生成的准确性和细粒度描述能力。
papers.abstract_en: Despite rapid advances in chest X-ray (CXR) foundation models, most radiologyreport generation (RRG) systems still rely on heavily downsampled inputs (eg,256x256) due to the fixed visual token budgets of pretrained vision encoders …

papers.title_en: HPR-SAM: Hierarchical Probabilistic Representation Learning for Prompt-free SAM-based Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学图像分割中 Segment Anything Model (SAM) 的无提示（Prompt-free）适配问题，提出了 HPR-SAM 框架。现有方法多关注提示生成而忽视了提示质量。HPR-SAM 通过引入分层概率表示学习，增强了模型对医学图像复杂结构的建模能力，实现了更稳健的自动分割。该方法在多个医学影像数据集上表现优异，显著提升了 SAM 在无人工干预下的分割精度和可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Prompt-free adaptation of the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has emerged as apromising paradigm for automatic medical image segmentation. Existing methodsmainly focus on prompt generation, while overlooking that prompt quality is …

papers.title_en: Constrained Decoding for Diffusion Language Models via Efficient Inference over Finite Automata
papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散语言模型（DLM）在生成结构化内容（如JSON）时的局限性，提出了一种基于有限自动机的高效受限解码框架。不同于传统的自回归模型，该方法利用自动机在扩散模型的去噪过程中动态引导词元选择，确保输出严格遵循预定义的语法规则。实验证明，该方法在保证生成质量的同时，显著提升了非自回归模型处理复杂约束任务的能力。
papers.abstract_en: Constrained decoding is essential for serving LLMs, ensuring that generated outputsfollow specific structures such as JSON schema-formatted function calls. Existingsystems are designed for autoregressive models and assume left-to-right generation …
